_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 2026-04-22T22:18:17Z tick — heartbeat: 5 stale news_flash events (1 iran_ceasefire Apr 12 Islamabad backgrounder URL-matched 'Islamabad' kw after prior TUNE + 4 opec_supply archives Aug 2025/Sep 2025/Mar 2026 matched broad 'increase'/'hike'/'announce' kw). TUNED opec_supply: added match_keywords=['2026','April','May 2026','June 2026'] date filter, narrowed kw to action-verbs/supply-shock, cooldown 60→120min. All 3 level_alerts KEEP by mechanical rules (USDJPY dist 53p<3×H4ATR 93p, GOLD dist 38p<3×H4ATR 109p + counterfactual 4h=0.8 real edge, OIL dist 195p<3×H4ATR 675p + counterfactual 4h=0.67). USDJPY readiness=moderate (agree 4/4 bullish) but dist>3×H1ATR=42p → WATCH not ARMED. No ADDs — no sharper levels on other 6 pairs (BTC comp=+43.5 moderate 4/4 but no clean level). 0 trades.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout. Live 22:32 UTC 4733.30 (-19.5p vs 15:55 4752.76, now 41.7p below trigger). Day range 4715.44-4772.24 — 4772 HIGH CONFIRMED REJECTED (validated the spike-fade caution from prior note). Crude ripping +3% but gold ROLLING OFF = traders pricing Hormuz as oil-supply story not capital-flight escalation; gold-safehaven bid weakening. Thesis still valid on a NEXT escalation rung (US casualties, formal walkout, Hormuz reopen refusal hardening) but conv now 3 (was 4 at session high). If 4775 tagged: require M15 BOS up + no rejection wick (two rejects at this zone today). Aggressive LIMIT 4735-4740 questionable now — gold already broke back below 4750 vs seizure floor thesis. level_alerts.note: ADDED 22:33 UTC — buy WTI 90.30 retest of broken 90 resistance as new support. Live 22:32 UTC 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39). Clean break above 90 on Hormuz blockade re-rating (IRGC seized 2 ships + fired on 3rd Apr 22) — gold NOT joining the move confirms this is oil-supply specific. Anticipation logic: pullback to 90.30 with M15 reject wick + hold = buy. If price accepts below 90 (closes M15 < 89.80) thesis dead. SL 89.20 (90p risk), TP1 93.50 (daily high break, ~320p), TP2 95.00 (~470p). Conv 4: fresh structural break + clear invalidation.
